    @allure.title("REF-8003")
    def test_REF_8003(adb):
    
        gps_fail = can_tx("GPSFailSts", 2, "Fail_Present", period=0.01)
    
        try:
            # ======================== Send GPSFailSts ========================
    
            with allure.step("Step 1: Clear log and send GPSFailSts CAN signal"):
                adb.clear_log()
                gps_fail.send()
                time.sleep(5)
    
            # ======================== Check All Apps Available ========================
    
            with allure.step("Step 2: Verify all 2nd party apps still available (arg2=0) after GPSFailSts"):
                start_test_app(adb)
                app_not_available = []
                for app in APP_FOR_TEST:
                    app_check_availability(adb, app)
                    log = app_logcat(adb)
                    if not re.search(pattern, log):
                        app_not_available.append(app)
                    time.sleep(0.5)
